description: Drive Claude Code from your phone — the cc-pocket daemon.
post_install: try { & "$dir\cc-pocket-daemon.exe" service-install --apply --relay wss://relay.txx.app | Write-Host } catch { Write-Host "service-install skipped (you can run it by hand): $_" }
notes: Prefer the install script: irm https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ac54u-mobile/cc-pocket/main/scripts/install.ps1 | iex
